meaning: n.意第绪语,依地语(犹太人使用的国际语)adj.意第绪语的,依地语,<俚>犹太人的
examples: I couldn't read or understand a word of Yiddish, so I asked him to translate.
He spoke Polish, Yiddish and Russian.
There are several Yiddish words to describe social misfits.
The other Klezmatics originals and what Lorin Sklamberg tells me is a Yiddish mode.
They came together in the theater, whether the plays were performed in Yiddish or English.
